examples: A single mosquito can infect a large number of people.
His creativity would infect other students.
There is, however, a chance that the virus will infect the bilby, an endangered native marsupial.
Even more alarming, resistant bacteria are breaking out to infect healthy people outside the hospital ward.
Antibiotic-resistant bacteria infect 100, 000 patients a year, and they are notoriously hard to fight.
